cards.name: Times Black ICICI Bank Credit Card
cards.rewards: 2% ICICI Bank reward points on all eligible domestic transactions and 2.5% on international spend; 1 Reward Point = Rs.0.40 against statement
cards.lounge: Unlimited complimentary domestic airport lounge access; complimentary Priority Pass membership (1,400+ lounges in 145+ countries)
cards.welcome_benefit: Luxury Stay Gift Card from EaseMyTrip or Lohono, lifestyle gift cards from Toni and Guy and Interflora, and annual Zomato Gold membership

cards.name: ICICI Bank Emeralde Private Metal Credit Card
cards.rewards: 6 reward points per Rs.200 on retail spend (grocery, utilities, education capped at 1,000 points per category per cycle)
cards.lounge: Unlimited international and domestic airport lounge access for both Primary and Plus card members
cards.welcome_benefit: Taj Epicure Plus Membership, EazyDiner Prime Membership and 12,500 Reward Points

cards.name: ICICI Bank Emeralde Private Credit Card
ICICI Bank Emeralde Credit Card
cards.rewards: 4 points per Rs.100 on domestic and international spend, 1 point per Rs.100 on utility/insurance spend
cards.lounge: Unlimited international and domestic airport lounge access for primary cardholder; new applicants get Priority Pass (1,400+ lounges in 145+ countries)
cards.welcome_benefit: TATA CLiQ shopping voucher worth Rs.5,000 (American Express variant, on birthday)

cards.name: ICICI Bank Sapphiro Credit Card
cards.rewards: 4 points per Rs.100 on international spend, 2 on domestic, 1 on utility/insurance spend
cards.lounge: 2 complimentary international lounge visits/year (Priority Pass for post-15-Nov-2024 applicants); 4 domestic lounge visits/quarter on Rs.75,000+ quarterly spend
cards.welcome_benefit: Vouchers worth over Rs.13,000 (Tata CliQ, EaseMyTrip, Da Milano, Croma) plus EazyDiner Prime Membership

cards.name: ICICI Bank Rubyx Credit Card
cards.rewards: 4 points per Rs.100 on international spend, 2 on domestic, 1 on utility/insurance spend

cards.welcome_benefit: Vouchers worth over Rs.5,000 (Tata CLiQ, Croma, EazyDiner, EaseMyTrip) plus 2 complimentary rounds of golf

cards.name: ICICI Bank Coral Credit Card

cards.welcome_benefit: Milestone rewards: 2,000 reward points on Rs.2 lakh spend and 1,000 for every additional Rs.1 lakh
